title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
